title: Inkqubo ye-Affiliate
attention: Le nkqubo ye-affiliate ayicwangciswanga ngokukhankanya 'amalungu osapho' okanye 'abasexhasi'. Nceda ufunde {faqLink} ngaphambi kokuqhubeka.
earnDescription: Ngokongeza isixhobo kuInterServer kwiwebhusayithi yakho, uya kufumana ikomishini ye-{amount} kwisithengiso ngasinye esitsha esisifumana ngokucofa isixhobo kwiwebhusayithi yakho.
shareUrl: Yabelana nge-URL yakho eyodwa ye-affiliate nabahlobo

status.title: Isimo
status.defaultDesc: Umxhasi ubhalisiwe phantsi kwe-affiliate kodwa akagqibezeli iimfuno.
status.pendingDesc: Umxhasi ugqibezele iimfuno zexesha nentlawulo, kwaye ulindela ukuqinisekiswa ngumphathi.
status.failedDesc: Umxhasi akagqibezeli iimfuno okanye i-affiliate yephula imiqathango ekufumaneni umxhasi.

paymentSetup.title: Ukuseta intlawulo
paymentSetup.choosePayment: Khetha okufuna ukwenziwa ngentlawulo yakho ye-affiliate
paymentSetup.createPrepay: Yenza iPrePay nesixa ukuze isebenziseke ngokuzenzekelayo kwiiiatshi zam.

webTrafficPage.title: Itrafikhi yewebhu yamuva nje
webTrafficPage.noTraffic: Akukho trafikhi ye-affiliate yamva nje enganqunywa

viewBanners.title: Iibhena
viewBanners.bannerNote: Ngezinkcukacha malunga nebhena efana nekhodi ye-HTML, ubungakanani bomfanekiso, njl., cofa nayiphi na ibhena ofuna ukuyisebenzisa kwiwebhusayithi yakho.

dockSetup.title: Ukuseta i-Dock
dockSetup.couponTooltip: Xa umxhasi omtsha esebenzisa le khuponi, uya kumphawula njengoshiyelwe nguwe kwaye uya kuhlelwa njengesithengiso se-affiliate.
dockSetup.descriptionPlaceholder: Sebenzisa le khuponi xa ugqiba isicelo ukuze ufumane inyanga yokuqala yokusingathwa ngepeni enye.

faqPage.title: Imibuzo ebuziwa kaninzi
faqPage.a1: Sihlawula ikomishini engama-$100 ngokusimileyo kwisithengiso ngasinye, kwaye le ngenye yeenkqubo ze-affiliate ezihlawula ngaphezulu.
faqPage.q2: 2. Kuthatha ixesha elingakanani ukuba isithengiso sibonakale kwi-akhawunti yam?
faqPage.a3_step2: Ngasekunene kwaphantsi uya kubona indlela yokujonga Iphepha le-Affiliate.
faqPage.a3_step3: Apha unokubona zonke ikomishini zakho ezilindileyo nezivumileyo.
faqPage.q4: 4. Ndiyazi umntu odinga ukusingathwa. Ndizithola njani imali yokukhankanya?
faqPage.a4_step2: Skrolela ezantsi ukubona isixhobo sakho se-affiliate.
faqPage.a4_step3: Thumela isixhobo esi kumhlobo wakho odinga ukusingathwa.
faqPage.a4_step4: Xa bacofa isixhobo eso baze bodola i-akhawunti nathi, ufumana ikomishini.
faqPage.q5: 5. Ndivunyelwe kwinkqubo ye-affiliate yokusingathwa kwe-InterServer. Ndenzeni ngoku?
faqPage.a5_step1: Ngena kwi-akhawunti yakho ye-affiliate ukufikelela izixhobo zokurhweba ze-InterServer ngokucofa itabhu yeeiBhena namanxibelelwano.
faqPage.a5_step2: Khetha izixhobo zokurhweba ofuna ukuzongeza kwisayithi yakho.
faqPage.a5_step3: Uya kubona iikhodi zeebhena ngasekunene kweeibhena zonke; kopisha iikhodi ezi zipaste kwisayithi yakho.
faqPage.a5_step4: Xa umntu ecofa isixhobo eso baze bathenge i-akhawunti yokusingathwa, ufumana ikomishini.
faqPage.a6_line1: Ewe, kodwa nceda ungafaki imali kwigama lethu lenkampani, ukutshintsha kwegama lethu lenkampani, ukungabhalwa kakuhle, okanye nayiphi na ilizwi elineapcwe yegama lethu kufaka phakathi InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Gxila kwiiofafa zamagama afana nokusingathwa ngokukhawuleza, ukusingathwa kwe-PHP, ukusingathwa kwe-WordPress.
faqPage.a6_line3: Nceda usiqhagamshelane ukuba ufuna uncedo ekucingeni ngamagama.
faqPage.a6_line4: Qinisekisa ukuba wongeza InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, ukusingathwa kwewebhu kwe-InterServer njengamagama enkomfa awaliyo.
faqPage.q7: 7. Ndenzile isithengiso. Ngoku ndifumana nini imali?
faqPage.a7_line1: Emva kweentsuku ezingama-90 isithengiso esivumiweyo siya kutshintsha ukusuka kwisimo esiqhelekileyo ukuya kulindile.
faqPage.a7_line2: Xa isithengiso silindile, siya kuhlawulwa ngeeveki ezisixhenxe zokuqala zenyanga.
faqPage.a8_line1: Kungaba nezizathu ezimbalwa. Ngamanye amaxesha sifuna ixesha elithile ukuqinisekisa isithengiso.
faqPage.a8_line2: Enye into elula yokujonga kukuqinisekisa ukuba indlela yakho yokuhlawula isetwe.
faqPage.q9: 9. Kuthatha ixesha elingakanani ukuba izithengiso/iikomishini zam zilindile zide zivunywe?
faqPage.q10: 10. Ndingasebenzisa isixhobo sam se-affiliate sokuzibhekisa kwizikhokelo kwizikhundla endizisebenzisela izinto zobuqu?
faqPage.a10: Hayi. Nayiphi na inxibelelwano ne-akhawunti ethengiswa kwakhona iya kuphela kwimpazamo yesithengiso.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Indlela efanayo yokuhlawula isetyenziswe kwi-akhawunti enye.
faqPage.a11_reason3: Inkqubo yaqaphela ukuba, we, i-affiliate, usebenzisa ne-akhawunti yomxhasi.
faqPage.a11_policy: Njengoko ukukhawulezisa kwethu kwe-$100 kwisithengiso ngasinye kuyaphinda kube ngaphezulu kwesivuno esibuyisiweyo kumxhasi nasemva konyaka omnye, sinayo imigaqo eqinileyo yokubamba izibhekiso ezingagqibelelananga nemigaqo yethu. Ukuba ubhekisa umhlobo okanye umxhasi, mnika nje isixhobo okanye ikhuponi. Musa ukwabelana ngeendlela zokuhlawula kwaye ungasebenzisi i-akhawunti.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Nceda ubuyele imiqathango ye-affiliate yethu apha:
faqPage.q12: 12. Ndingumklami/mphuhli kwaye ndibhekisa abasexhasi. Kulungile oku?
faqPage.a12_line1: Le nguqu ayizokusebenzana nathi (okanye nayiphi na enye inkqubo ye-affiliate yokusingathwa). Xa kukho iifaniso ezenzeka kwiiakhawunti ezininzi, iikomishini ziyaphazamiseka.
faqPage.a12_line2: Oku kwenziwa ukukhusela umntu ofanayo ekubhaliseni kwaye ezenzela imali enkqubo yethu ye-affiliate ngokuzibhekisa.
faqPage.a12_line3: Ungathetha ukucinga ngokusingatha abasexhasi ngokuthe ngqo kwaye ubahlawulise wena usebenzisa into efana ne-PayPal. Ungathenge i-akhawunti yokusingathwa komdali kuthi kwaye uqale.
